caption: The video features a woman with curly hair, wearing headphones and a green shirt with "BOSS TALK 101" printed on it, sitting in front of a microphone in what appears to be a podcast recording setup. She is engaged in conversation, possibly hosting or participating in a podcast episode. The background includes a poster with the text "BOSS TALK 101" and an image of two individuals, suggesting the theme or branding of the podcast. There is also a framed picture on the wall behind her, adding to the professional yet casual atmosphere of the setting. The woman seems focused and attentive, indicating an active discussion or interview taking place.
